params.prompt: Create a square 2x4 asset sheet of eight traditional anime RPG stat/progress bar FRAMES ONLY for a mobile fitness app called UNBOUND. IMPORTANT: each frame must read left-to-right like a stat bar: strong left origin cap, long simple horizontal track, clean right end cap. NO center crest, NO center ornament, NO filled progress, NO text, NO numbers, NO characters. Simplified and mobile-readable, not sci-fi, not cyberpunk, not battery. Dark graphite metal and bone-white linework on near-black, with very subtle colored edge accents. Style: dark fantasy anime RPG status screen, training arc UI, minimalist Japanese brutalism. Eight frames: XP blue, press ember, pull steel blue, legs red-orange, core green, mobility teal, explosive magenta-violet, rare white-violet. Each cell contains one bar frame centered with generous padding, simple shape language, crisp edges, suitable for overlaying a SwiftUI colored fill underneath.
